sql_array: CREATE TABLE events (event_id INT, event_time TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT get_current_timestamp());
UPDATE events SET event_time = get_current_timestamp() WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, event_time FROM events WHERE event_time > get_current_timestamp() - INTERVAL '1 hour';
SELECT count(*) FROM events WHERE event_time < get_current_timestamp();
